{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Sage's folded map
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] possesses the [[Sage's folded map]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
